title: Problems when using the VAR_POP function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t56(c1 INT, c2 FLOAT, c3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t56(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 2.5, TRUE), (2, NULL, FALSE), (3, 3.5, TRUE);
CREATE TABLE t57(c4 VARCHAR(255), c5 DATETIME);
SELECT VAR_POP(t56.c1) FROM t56 GROUP BY t56.c3 HAVING t56.c3 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results using VAR_POP with HAVING clause
